headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.paypal.com https://www.paypalobjects.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.paypal.com; frame-src 'self' https://www.paypal.com; form-action 'self' https://www.paypal.com; upgrade-insecure-requests; block-all-mixed-content;
